mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sync_task ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sync_task (id, name, source_connector_type, source_config, source_table, target_table, sync_mode, sync_field, batch_size, max_retries, retry_interval_ms, cron_expression, depends_on, status, created_at, last_run_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{sourceConnectorType}, #{sourceConfig, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.data.handler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, #{sourceTable}, #{targetTable}, #{syncMode}, #{syncField}, #{batchSize}, #{maxRetries}, #{retryIntervalMs}, #{cronExpression}, #{dependsOn, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.data.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{lastRunAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE sync_task SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sync_task SET name = #{name}, source_connector_type = #{sourceConnectorType}, source_config = #{sourceConfig, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.data.handler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, source_table = #{sourceTable}, target_table = #{targetTable}, sync_mode = #{syncMode}, sync_field = #{syncField}, batch_size = #{batchSize}, max_retries = #{maxRetries}, retry_interval_ms = #{retryIntervalMs}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, depends_on = #{dependsOn, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.data.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, last_run_at = #{lastRunAt} WHERE id = #{id}
